description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND a Live game is on the schedule
AND the Live game is in a Suspended state
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to a Suspended Live game in the Hero
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Live, Suspended, <away_team>, <away_team_runs>, <home_team>, <home_team_runs>, <half_inning>, <men_on_base>, <balls_strikes_count>, <number_of_outs>, <Watch Now/Watch Live>, press select to play, press up for the Main Menu, press down to browse more content."
